name: a formatter's style difference on a well-formed file is advisory, never a blocking red violation
command: printf '%s' '{"ok":true}' > good.json && if command -v prettier >/dev/null 2>&1; then bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/run-tool.sh" --tool prettier --file good.json 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -ne 1 ] && grep -q 'status=advisory' e.txt && echo formatter-is-advisory 1>&2; else echo formatter-is-advisory 1>&2; fi
